name: memory-crystal
description: Sovereign memory system — local-first with ephemeral encrypted relay. Your memory, your machine, your rules.

scripts.build: tsup src/core.ts src/cli.ts src/mcp-server.ts src/openclaw.ts src/migrate.ts src/cc-hook.ts src/cc-poller.ts src/crypto.ts src/pair.ts src/poller.ts src/mirror-sync.ts src/ldm.ts src/summarize.ts src/role.ts src/doctor.ts src/bridge.ts --format esm --dts --outDir dist && tsup src/worker.ts --format esm --outDir dist --no-dts && cp scripts/crystal-capture.sh scripts/ldm-backup.sh dist/
scripts.build:local: tsup src/core.ts src/cli.ts src/mcp-server.ts src/openclaw.ts src/migrate.ts src/cc-hook.ts src/cc-poller.ts src/crypto.ts src/pair.ts src/poller.ts src/mirror-sync.ts src/ldm.ts src/summarize.ts src/role.ts src/doctor.ts src/bridge.ts --format esm --dts --outDir dist
scripts.deploy:cloud: bash -c 'git diff --quiet HEAD -- src/ wrangler-mcp.toml || (echo "ERROR: uncommitted changes. commit before deploying." && exit 1)' && wrangler deploy --config wrangler-mcp.toml
scripts.deploy:demo: bash -c 'git diff --quiet HEAD -- src/ wrangler-demo.toml || (echo "ERROR: uncommitted changes. commit before deploying." && exit 1)' && wrangler deploy --config wrangler-demo.toml
scripts.dev: tsup src/core.ts src/cli.ts src/mcp-server.ts src/openclaw.ts src/migrate.ts src/cc-hook.ts src/crypto.ts --format esm --watch --outDir dist
